assertions.title: Output file is a valid PDF with correct filename

steps.action: Upload output-assertions-input.pdf and click 'Download redacted PDF'
steps.expected: Download is triggered and output filename follows [original]-redacted.pdf
steps.observed: Done screen rendered; intercepted anchor download filename was 'output-assertions-input-redacted.pdf'

steps.expected: Downloaded file is a non-empty valid PDF
steps.observed: Saved artifact ui/output-a/a3646ab2-6280-42d6-a0f7-67e5f34dae31 is 33,661,411 bytes and identified as 'PDF document, version 1.3, 1 pages'

evidence.network: No network requests observed during the flow

assertions.title: Output is fully rasterized — no selectable text

steps.action: Attempt text selection on downloaded output PDF
steps.observed: Selection attempt captured (headless browser PDF viewer rendered blank canvas, no selectable text indicators)

steps.action: Extract text from output PDF via pdfjs getTextContent
steps.observed: Parsed output artifact returned totalTextItems=0 and extractedTextLength=0

evidence.network: No network requests observed during the flow

frictions.description: Upload by element ref failed because the visible 'browse your files' control is a button role, not the native file input.
frictions.resolution: Used direct selector upload on input[type=file].

frictions.description: Headless session ignored late --download-path override and stored download with a UUID filename without extension.
frictions.resolution: Verified filename contract using intercepted anchor download attribute and validated file contents directly.

frictions.description: Headless browser PDF viewer did not render visible page content when reopening the generated output for manual selection checks.
frictions.resolution: Used pdfjs text extraction on the downloaded artifact to verify no selectable/extractable text.

summary: Tested 2 assertions (VAL-OUT-003, VAL-OUT-004): both passed. Filename contract and PDF validity were confirmed for VAL-OUT-003, and no extractable text was confirmed for VAL-OUT-004.
